title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!
